message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate var_renames.get() to getZigName()

Migrate 61 occurrences of var_renames.get(name) orelse name pattern
to use the centralized getZigName() method. This is Phase 3 of the
Pass 2.5 Variable Resolution plan.

Changes:
- Replace simple var_renames.get(x) orelse x patterns with getZigName(x)
- Replace chain fallbacks ending in orelse name with getZigName()
- Simplify conditional emit patterns where applicable
- Document Pass 2.5 lookup status in getZigName()

Remaining 48 var_renames.get() calls are intentional:
- Save/restore patterns for scope management
- Pattern checks (p_*.*, __comp_*, (try prefix)
- Keyword escaping with writeEscapedIdent() fallback
- getZigName() implementation itself

Pass 2.5 unique name lookup is disabled until variable declarations
are migrated to use getZigName(). Currently falls back to var_renames.
